  • Package com.nib.commons.io

    • Class com.nib.commons.io.CatalogEntryCustomizer

      class CatalogEntryCustomizer extends LinkedList<com.nib.commons.io.CatalogEntryCustomizer.Criteria> implements Serializable

    • Class com.nib.commons.io.FileDescriptor

      class FileDescriptor extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • attributes
          FileAttributes attributes
          Additional file attributes.
        • cached
          boolean cached
          Indicates if the file content is cached.
        • catalog
          String catalog
          The catalog name. Defaults to FileDescriptor.DEFAULT_CATALOG if not specified.
        • dDName
          String dDName
          The DD name associated with this file descriptor.
        • dsn
          String dsn
          The dataset name.
        • dummy
          boolean dummy
          Indicates if this is a dummy file.
        • fileOrganization
          FileOrganization fileOrganization
          The organization of the file (e.g., PS, PO, VSAM).
        • gdgCurrentVersion
          Integer gdgCurrentVersion
          Current version of the GDG.
        • gdgLimit
          Integer gdgLimit
          Generation Data Group (GDG) limit.
        • gdgOldestVersion
          Integer gdgOldestVersion
          Oldest version of the GDG.
        • inStreamData
          String inStreamData
          Content for in-stream data (JCL instream).
        • keyLength
          int keyLength
          Length of the primary key.
        • keyOffset
          int keyOffset
          Offset of the primary key.
        • keys
          LinkedList<KsdsKey> keys
          List of keys for VSAM KSDS files.
        • maxRecordLength
          Integer maxRecordLength
          The maximum record length.
        • member
          String member
          The PDS member name.
        • minRecordLength
          Integer minRecordLength
          The minimum record length.
        • nextConcatenated
          FileDescriptor nextConcatenated
          The next file descriptor in a concatenation sequence.
        • path
          String path
          The assigned path of the file.
        • physical
          String physical
          The physical path or name of the file on the storage system.
        • recordFormat
          RecordFormat recordFormat
          The record format (e.g., Fixed, Variable).
        • related
          String related
          The related file or resource name (used for AIX/PATH associations).
        • sysout
          Sysout sysout
          Sysout configuration if this file directs to spool.
        • variableFormatType
          VariableFormatType variableFormatType
          The variable format type (e.g., IBM, MICROFOCUS).
        • vsamOrganization
          VsamOrganization vsamOrganization
          The VSAM organization (e.g., KSDS, ESDS, RRDS), if applicable.

      class RecordAlreadyAllocatedException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable
